projects.phase: Phase 2 - Signal Layer + Brain-v2 Integration + MCP
projects.label: EVA DTL
projects.goal: Real-time zero-trust decision authorization engine for AI actors. DTL(actor, action, data, context, time) -> ALLOW | DENY | CONDITIONAL state with confidence, obligations, and time-bound expiry.
projects.notes: Replaces 47-eva-mti (spec-only). Phase 1 complete (28 tests, MTI 100). Phase 2 complete 2026-02-24: SignalCollector (6 collectors, per-signal TTL cache), DecisionCache (LRU 1024, expiry-enforced), dtl_client.py (Tier 1 in-process in brain-v2), dtl_guard.py (@require_dtl decorator), all 7 chat routes guarded, MCP server 3 tools in 29-foundry. 59/59 tests pass.
